item.title: About me
item.description: Welcome to my personal blog! My name is Emanuele also known as maxcohen on the internet, and I am a computer science student. I created this blog as a way to share my thoughts, experiences, and learnings with the world. On this blog, you can expect to find a wide range of topics that I am passionate about, including Linux, and programming in general. I believe that there is something to be learned from every experience, and I strive to share the valuable lessons I have learned through my own journey.
